domainMarketCompetitive: Domain: Incident, Request, Problem, Change, Knowledge, SLAs.
Market: Shift from ticketing to AI-first, self-service, LLM copilots.
Competitive: ServiceNow vs Jira SM, BMC, Freshservice; SN edge via PI, GenAI, Agentic flows and platform breadth.
techSpecsBestPractices: Core tables: incident, sc_request, problem, change_request, kb_knowledge.
Flow Designer + Subflows; IntegrationHub spokes; disciplined Update Sets/CICD.
Security: RBAC, ACLs, Data Policies; naming/versioning; test in sub-prod; metrics dashboards.
moduleOverview.problem: High MTTR and inconsistent categorization/assignment cause delays and poor CSAT.
moduleOverview.hypothesis: PI + Agentic Workflows + GenAI summaries reduce triage/resolution by 30–40% and improve CSAT.
prototype: Auto-categorize/assign incidents via PI; route through subflows.
GenAI case/incident summaries and KB suggestions.
Dashboards for SLA breach risk, backlog aging, deflection.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITSM_Project1
projects.summary: Incident/Request flows with AI-assisted routing & knowledge.

domainMarketCompetitive: Use self-service intake + virtual agent handoff to reduce emails.
Compete on speed-to-resolution and transparency via SLAs/dashboards.
techSpecsBestPractices: Flow: create/update incident; subflows for assignment & notifications.
Tables: incident, task_sla; KB: kb_knowledge; ACLs for sensitive fields.
points.problem: Manual triage slows assignment and increases ping-pong.
points.hypothesis: PI-based categorization + auto-assignment cuts triage time significantly.
prototype: Train PI model on historical incidents.

domainMarketCompetitive: LLM-assisted agents: summarize, extract intents, next-best-actions.
Competitive differentiator: reduce handle time without quality drop.
techSpecsBestPractices: GenAI action for summarization; store to work notes or KB draft.
Guardrails: PII masking, prompt templates, human-in-the-loop.
points.problem: Agents spend time writing updates; knowledge not captured.
points.hypothesis: Auto-summaries improve throughput and knowledge reusability.
prototype: Summarize resolution; propose KB; supervisor approval flow.
Telemetry: measure deflection & average summary time saved.

domainMarketCompetitive: Cross-system remediation lowers context switching.
Agentic orchestration drives proactive operations.
techSpecsBestPractices: IntegrationHub spokes for CRM/Chat/Email; retries & idempotency.
Audit: update sets, scoped app, versioned subflows.
points.hypothesis: Automated orchestration shortens resolution and reduces errors.

domainMarketCompetitive: Transparency on SLAs and agent performance is a buying criterion.
Benchmark vs industry with PA widgets.
techSpecsBestPractices: Task SLA, PA indicators, breakdowns; consistent time zones.
Backfill jobs, retention; access by role.
points.hypothesis: Actionable dashboards lift SLA adherence and CSAT.

domainMarketCompetitive: Domain: Discovery, CMDB, Event Mgmt, Service Mapping, Health, AIOps.
Market: Convergence of observability + remediation with AI.
Competitive: SN ITOM vs Dynatrace/Datadog/Splunk; CMDB context + workflows wins.
techSpecsBestPractices: Pattern-based discovery, identification & reconciliation; CI class governance.
Event de-dup, correlation rules; anomaly detection via PI.
Remediation subflows with approvals and safety checks.
moduleOverview.problem: Alert noise and incomplete CMDB slow RCA and increase MTTR.
moduleOverview.hypothesis: Service maps + correlation + AIOps reduce noise and speed remediation.
prototype: Event ingestion table; correlation → create incident/change.
Auto-remediation subflows; health dashboards and CMDB KPIs.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITOM_Project1
projects.summary: Discovery + CMDB health with automated fixes.

domainMarketCompetitive: Accurate CMDB is the foundation for AIOps and impact analysis.
Compete on reliability and speed of change impact.
techSpecsBestPractices: Identification/Normalization; CI health scores; out-of-box metrics.
Flow-based fixes; approvals for sensitive classes.
points.problem: Stale/missing CIs break correlation and impact chains.
points.hypothesis: Automated discovery + health drives better RCA.
prototype: Health KPI widgets; auto-create tasks for gaps.

domainMarketCompetitive: Noise reduction is essential for SRE productivity.
Differentiator: event → action via platform flows.
techSpecsBestPractices: Event rules, correlation; PI anomalies; incident linkage.
points.hypothesis: Correlation + anomalies + runbooks cut noise by 40%.
prototype: Correlation examples; anomaly model on metrics.

domainMarketCompetitive: Business service views drive prioritization by impact.
Compete with topology-first observability tools.
techSpecsBestPractices: Top-down mapping; credentials; patterns; change sync.
Health aggregation; impact rules → incident priorities.
points.problem: Teams cannot see blast radius for failures.
points.hypothesis: Maps + health scores improve incident triage.
prototype: Key service maps; CMDB relationships; impact calculators.

domainMarketCompetitive: Shift from reactive to predictive ops.
Self-healing differentiates mature ops.
techSpecsBestPractices: PI models; runbooks; safe-guard rails; change blackout.
points.hypothesis: Predict + pre-empt recurring failures.

domainMarketCompetitive: Domain: HR cases, lifecycle events, employee journeys, KB.
Market: HR assistants, conversational routing, self-service.
Competitive: SN HRSD vs Workday Extend/Zendesk; win via flow/PI.
techSpecsBestPractices: HR tables & security; decision tables; lifecycle event orchestration.
Categorization via PI; journey accelerators; knowledge governance.
moduleOverview.problem: Manual routing & slow turnaround reduce employee satisfaction.
moduleOverview.hypothesis: PI + orchestration + GenAI replies improve CSAT and productivity.
prototype: GenAI summaries; article suggestions; metrics for FCR.

domainMarketCompetitive: Employee experience: speed + clarity.
Compete with HR suites via platform workflows.
techSpecsBestPractices: HR case tables, decision table inputs/outputs.
Privacy controls; role-based access for HR data.
points.hypothesis: Explicit rules reduce touches & time.
prototype: Auto-assignment to HR teams; SLA tracking.

domainMarketCompetitive: Low-code HR automations accelerate change.
Compete on time-to-value and governance.
techSpecsBestPractices: Flow triggers; HR category; subflows; notifications.
points.hypothesis: Standardized flows cut handling time.

domainMarketCompetitive: AI boosts routing accuracy and fairness.
Quality measured by first-time right assignments.
techSpecsBestPractices: PI model training; outcome tracking; human review.
points.problem: Misrouted HR cases and slow resolution.
points.hypothesis: PI + SLAs increase throughput and CSAT.
prototype: SLA widget on HR agent workspace.

domainMarketCompetitive: LLM-assisted HR improves clarity and consistency.
Reduce repetitive writing for HR agents.
points.hypothesis: Auto-summaries improve speed and quality.
prototype: Draft HR response; generate KB article.

domainMarketCompetitive: Domain: Case mgmt, omnichannel, entitlements, deflection.
Market: AI chat, intent detection, proactive service.
Competitive: SN CSM vs Salesforce/Zendesk; edge via workflow + PI/GenAI.
techSpecsBestPractices: Case tables, SLAs/entitlements; PI intent; IntegrationHub (CRM/telephony).
moduleOverview.problem: High AHT, uneven quality across channels.
moduleOverview.hypothesis: PI routing + GenAI guidance reduces AHT and raises FCR/CSAT.
prototype: Omnichannel intake → PI intent → Agentic escalations.
GenAI suggestions; KB links; outcome dashboards.

domainMarketCompetitive: Respond faster with consistent tone.
Deflect via self-service and guided flows.
techSpecsBestPractices: Case table; reply templates; GenAI actions.
Audit & privacy; feedback loop on suggestions.
points.hypothesis: GenAI drafts reduce AHT while improving quality.
prototype: Prompted reply drafts; agent edit & send.

domainMarketCompetitive: Unified view removes swivel-chair.
Workflows across CRM/billing/fulfillment.
points.hypothesis: Orchestration improves FCR and agent experience.

domainMarketCompetitive: Proactive case handling reduces churn.
Differentiate with smart escalations.
points.hypothesis: Agentic SLAs boost speed and consistency.

domainMarketCompetitive: Deflection + quality of self-service matters to cost/CSAT.
LLM guidance scales expertise.
techSpecsBestPractices: KB tuning; search analytics; summary prompts.
points.problem: Support volume growth with limited staff.
points.hypothesis: Summaries + deflection free up agents.

domainMarketCompetitive: Domain: Risk, policy, compliance, audits, vendor risk, issues.
Market: Continuous control monitoring (CCM) and AI evidence checks.
Competitive: SN GRC vs Archer/OneTrust; platform advantage via workflow + CMDB context.
techSpecsBestPractices: Risk register, controls/tests, issues/tasks; SoD; approvals.
RBAC/ACLs; audit trails; data retention; evidence integrity.
moduleOverview.problem: Manual control testing and siloed evidence delay audits.
moduleOverview.hypothesis: Automated controls + AI evidence matching accelerate audits and reduce risk.
prototype: Vendor risk intake; dashboards for compliance posture.

domainMarketCompetitive: Policy-to-control linkage drives enforcement.
Comparative edge: native workflow + CMDB impact.
techSpecsBestPractices: Risk statements, controls, policy lifecycle; approvals.
Audit trail; retention; segregation of duties.
points.problem: Unclear control ownership and stale risks.
points.hypothesis: Workflow clarity raises closure rates.

domainMarketCompetitive: Third-party risk is a top audit focus.
Automations reduce questionnaire fatigue.
techSpecsBestPractices: Vendor tiering; control profiles; evidence attachments.
points.hypothesis: Automation accelerates assessments and reduces risk.
prototype: Vendor intake → tier scoring → control checks.

domainMarketCompetitive: Evidence integrity and traceability are audit must-haves.
Workflow-first audits reduce cycle time.
points.problem: Evidence spread across email and drives.
points.hypothesis: Centralized workflow accelerates audits.
